loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing cumulative active and reactive energy (kWh/kVArh) for this month across panel members; per-phase breakdown is not measured for this aggregate view.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy — per-feeder breakdown is rendered via roster; some members (Axial Fan Panel-1, Axial Fan Panel-2, Frisking+Security) are dark and will render as blanks.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing live active and reactive power from primary feeders; capacity marker and load factor are omitted because the asset's rated kVA is unknown and load factor data is unavailable on member meters.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing Worst Peak kW and UPS/BPDP demand series; Load Factor is not computed (no library fn), and HHF series is blank (no matching feeders in roster).
